description_long: This is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, padded headband and large, cushioned ear cups designed for comfort and noise isolation. The ear cups are circular and appear to be made of a matte black plastic with soft padding covered in synthetic leather. The headband is reinforced and has a textured finish, likely for added grip and durability. The JBL logo is prominently displayed on the exterior of each ear cup, indicating the brand. The headphones are foldable at the hinges where the ear cups connect to the headband, allowing for compact storage and portability. There are no visible wires, suggesting a wireless design, and the controls are likely integrated into the ear cups.
description: A pair of over-ear, wireless JBL headphones with padded ear cups and a sturdy, textured headband. The headphones are black with a matte finish and feature the JBL logo on each ear cup.
description_view_0: Front view showing both padded ear cups and the full arch of the headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the JBL logo on the left ear cup and the textured headband.
description_view_2: Angled front view similar to view 0, showing both ear cups and the headband arch.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the JBL logo on the right ear cup and the textured headband.
